description: Configure Wazuh to ingest and analyze logs from a legacy custom application named 'MegaCorpERP'. Monitor /var/log/megacorp.log and create a decoder in local_decoder.xml to extract 'dstuser' and 'srcip' from logs (Example: 2024-05-20 14:30:01 [MegaCorpERP] Auth: FAILED | User: jdoe | SrcIP: 192.168.1.55). Implement Rule 100501 for single failed logins and Rule 100502 (level 12) for password spraying in local_rules.xml. Rule 100502 must trigger on 5 occurrences of Rule 100501 within 60 seconds from the same source IP across different target users. Use /home/ga/generate_logs.sh to verify that Rule 100502 appears in the alerts.
